overview: Mediyra Lab is a B2B pathology laboratory management system with a web admin panel and partner portal. Lab staff manage tests, bookings, collection centers, and reports while collection center partners log in to browse the price list, book patient tests, and track sample status — all with a professional teal-and-white medical UI.
features: Role-based login for admin staff and collection center partners
Admin dashboard with booking counts, sample stats, and revenue summary
Full test catalog management with categories, pricing, and sample details
Booking management with status updates and PDF report uploads
Collection center management with credential assignment
Partner portal: price list, book patient, my bookings, track sample, billing, support
Automated email notifications when booking status changes
Secure PDF report storage and download for partners
